venv/EnvBuilder/upgrade_dependencies.name: upgrade_dependencies
venv/EnvBuilder/upgrade_dependencies.description: Upgrades the core venv dependency packages (currently pip) in the environment. This is done by shelling out to the pip executable in the environment. Added in version 3.9. Changed in version 3.12: setuptools is no longer a core venv dependency.
